---
title: "Pipeline"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# UIAO Generation Pipeline

> **ADR-0005 Rationale:** Add a dedicated pipeline documentation page with live
> PlantUML rendering to give agency reviewers an interactive, visual overview of
> the UIAO document-compilation workflow. Material for MkDocs + `pymdownx.superfences`
> handles client-side PlantUML rendering with zero extra plugins.

## Pipeline Overview

The UIAO Document Compiler transforms canon YAML data through a multi-stage
pipeline, producing compliance-ready artifacts in Markdown, DOCX, PDF, PPTX,
and OSCAL JSON formats.

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHTRvim58Rl-HLMTrsrqrQfsiLKFfEcQHADQTeafEa4dCGA72Fxa7RxzRKTsi3MGhdqUHvppclmZIPGr5Ibf_S2Qr1GiJNa-wsI3HQXBALY7nBtT8Y2Rw0fAP582wWuyvM0xWw-KlAXbJy6d_ohi5CCf2guUgkgU4w0sv8FOxNf4ROZ44eQ8VoSn47Gds4gb5KjaIEzitMRoqZZGyXpKuECJNW8EENuxsd6rybb4h-IvNzWa7pk7VjBMgDRdX8RHICWM8D-Hv_5C_dAAPHyGumaKsAx8rO8ExwGwBt4mCv2G8dibty_pz1kTN76G3E_YwJvZbUGuGyeXK7C1eu9F9-Tdtzb0Vl23iSIxsg-8h61d39SI5KPuE_93Rt0kQ5niQtsv0b7he2aol2RR8WhfqNshukkhY-zqEcHqNCJgYXxyZseVI4Vq4maStsSAFOYfyH6iQjTFbg6FpFaZxLKf2zCzV7e9AsJ64U9VFVRbhhYCWtzEPkboyL9bpg7ykXFMdzYVBVSIpLTlMrEMtDgJAthhhTQJ5YuCzUJpX2qvaOKbVbGspblM_FMHkEmdhpwtfcqhgcTTDPQCsFPrQup5mVEKa4ymucWQRDcA_iwvzrviVFkZ5VjRQvitOYoyBmRZeMvG9y0)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

## Stage Details

### 1. Schema Validation

All canon YAML files in `data/` are validated against JSON schemas in
`schemas/`. This ensures structural correctness before any generation begins.

### 2. Artifact Normalization

Data is merged, cross-referenced, and ordered into canonical form. Control
plane mappings, compliance matrices, and KSI categories are resolved.

### 3. Generator Router

The Typer CLI (`uiao generate`) dispatches to the appropriate generator based
on the requested output format:

| Generator | Output | Location |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| `docs` | Jinja2 Markdown | `docs/` |
| `rich_docx` | Styled DOCX | `exports/docx/` |
| `oscal` | Component Definition JSON | `exports/oscal/` |
| `ssp` | SSP Skeleton JSON | `exports/oscal/` |
| `charts` | Compliance PNG charts | `assets/images/` |
| `pptx` | Leadership briefing PPTX | `exports/pptx/` |

### 4. MkDocs Publish

Generated Markdown and exported artifacts are served via MkDocs Material on
GitHub Pages, providing an always-current agency-facing dashboard.

## Zero-Trust Architecture Flow

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHDZvim48Rl_XKMUwoYTjLMgdgere5GeMv8929LYhXCm4cjm3Wo9lrI_tl79jc5DY7BQMoUUUUT6SH3Oy7OjgvOirTu00Crtq2ntndTOXdgIXj-5_kdHvHo2srbOuqsXLfoOHJq5OGn-lif-NxwLhmFUo-dsfJIN7jhP641TvKSnmxa4NOt8DJs1Y4AguxA_XodGbqVD4gqBxJkvdB3-1XoDZNAk0cF0Szp_7URim_nctXsOPR_WTFutM3jJzEwAVayiPje11OsqBp0PtacBso1dPhWGP2KL9TSycK5A8E0_sPFm-21-DKQ-c2Z76Te3V0a2ZWqNApxKAYnL5PfX2f7KHIoQJmLBjA8YJMVJ3vrSIzd7Wl-AiT87bKX-SgqZVKvTCySwvFSuK_Vh2XBG-eATvVj9hZLcqh_8E4eyNfHcWs09Jzfv3W79DMQslTaiXHpHhYlx0-3qekZD1LS6LCMJRwAbB_ESRrAXPVBXksgmkX9ZfdSkOBWfjLXiyyiwxfruQ3aIbPapvfhHGzLYtjNjDlINAEosdIooyS--YLBQ2JGVDjeCAKdw8eHvIkxc2gxdNWZ4NFzdsForOL3pKKMYaUgRQpQGc6xbVjBHde-mv_uHqvBfg-ia8mzI2pfz_aN)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

---

*This page is auto-generated as part of the UIAO Document Compiler pipeline.*
